title: luzula campestris var. pratensis
intro: Luzula campestris var. pratensis, also known as Field Woodrush, is a perennial plant species in the family Juncaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat conditions such as kidney stones, bladder problems, and arthritis. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving urinary function, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Luzula campestris var. pratensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its root and rhizome are often used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues.
